name: finviz-ticker-news
title: Stock News Scraper - Finviz
description: Get real-time stock and company news for any ticker symbol. Returns headlines, sources, publication dates, and full article text as clean markdown. Powered by Finviz data. Supports multiple tickers per run. Built for AI agents, LLM pipelines, sentiment analysis, and automated market monitoring.
seoTitle: Stock News Scraper by Ticker - Full Article Text API
seoDescription: Scrape stock and company news by ticker symbol. Get headlines, sources, dates, and full article text as markdown. Supports AAPL, TSLA, NVDA and any ticker. For AI agents and sentiment analysis.

ticker.title: Ticker symbol
ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol this article is associated with.

title.title: Headline
title.description: The article headline as shown on the Finviz news table.

url.title: Article URL
url.description: Direct link to the original article on the publisher's website (e.g. Yahoo Finance, Reuters, CNBC).

source.title: Source domain
source.description: Domain name of the article publisher, extracted from the article URL.

publishedAt.title: Published at
publishedAt.description: Publication date and time in UTC, ISO 8601 format. Parsed from Finviz's news table timestamps.

fullTextAvailable.title: Full text available
fullTextAvailable.description: Whether the full article text was successfully extracted from the source website. False if the article is behind a paywall or extraction failed.

text.title: Article text
text.description: Full article text extracted from the source website and converted to clean markdown. Null if extraction failed or scrapeFullText is disabled. Truncated to maxArticleLength characters (default 15,000, set to 0 for no limit).
text.example:
# Apple Reports Record Q1 Revenue

Apple reported quarterly revenue of $124 billion...

wordCount.title: Word count
wordCount.description: Number of words in the extracted article text. Null if full text was not extracted.
